records.ety: [L. incorrectus: cf. F. incorrect. See In- not, and Correct.]

defs: Not correct; not according to a copy or model, or to established rules; inaccurate; faulty.
quotes: The piece, you think, is incorrect.

defs: Not in accordance with the truth; inaccurate; not exact; as, an incorrect statement or calculation.
Not accordant with duty or morality; not duly regulated or subordinated; unbecoming; improper; as, incorrect conduct.
quotes: It shows a will most incorrect to heaven.
The wit of the last age was yet more incorrect than their language.
